ENTS657 Satellite Communication Systems (3 Credits)

An examination of satellite telecommunication systems with an emphasis on the mobile satellite systems (MSS). Topics will include

a historical perspective, orbital mechanics and constellations, choice

of orbital parameters, propagations considerations, link budgets, interference issues and other obstacles, and existing and proposed mobile satellite systems. It will also look at some of the business aspects such as the cost of deploying and maintaining these systems.
